items.content:
About This Role

We are looking for a Full Stack Engineer to join our Paris team and work across the entire web stack. You will build features end-to-end, from designing database schemas and APIs to crafting responsive user interfaces. Our stack centers on Node.js, Vue.js, and MongoDB, and we value engineers who are comfortable working across boundaries.

You will be part of a small, autonomous squad responsible for a critical part of our platform, with the freedom to make impactful technical decisions every day.

Responsibilities

  • Develop and ship full-stack features using Node.js, Vue.js, and MongoDB
  • Design and implement RESTful APIs and server-side logic
  • Build responsive, accessible user interfaces that work across devices and browsers
  • Write automated tests and participate in code reviews to maintain quality
  • Troubleshoot production issues and contribute to on-call rotation
  • Collaborate with product managers and designers to scope and refine feature requirements

Requirements

  • 3-5 years of professional full-stack development experience
  • Proficiency in JavaScript/TypeScript on both client and server
  • Experience with Node.js and at least one modern frontend framework (Vue, React, or Angular)
  • Familiarity with MongoDB or other document databases
  • Good understanding of web performance, security, and accessibility

Nice to Have

  • Experience with ApostropheCMS or similar content management frameworks
  • Familiarity with Docker and container-based development workflows
  • French language proficiency
